name: bedrock-vscode-chat
displayName: AWS Bedrock Provider for GitHub Copilot Chat
description: Native AWS Bedrock integration for GitHub Copilot Chat. Brings Claude, Llama, and Mistral models into your editor with streaming, function calling, and vision support across 14 regions.

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.region.description: AWS region for Bedrock services (e.g., us-east-1, eu-west-1)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.region.title: AWS Region

enumDescriptions: Use an AWS Bedrock API Key (Bearer Token)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.authMe.title: Authentication Method

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.apiKey.description: AWS Bedrock API Key (Bearer Token) - starts with 'bedrock-api-key-'. Can be long-term (1-365 days) or short-term (up to 12 hours). Only used when authMethod is 'api-key'.
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.apiKey.title: Bedrock API Key

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.profil.description: AWS profile name from ~/.aws/credentials (only used when authMethod is 'profile')
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.profil.title: AWS Profile

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.access.description: AWS Access Key ID (only used when authMethod is 'access-keys')
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.access.title: Access Key ID

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.secret.description: AWS Secret Access Key (only used when authMethod is 'access-keys')
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.secret.title: Secret Access Key

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.sessio.description: AWS Session Token for temporary credentials (optional)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.sessio.title: Session Token

enumDescriptions: Model decides when to think — recommended for Opus 4.5+ and Sonnet 4.5+
Always think with a token budget — for Opus 4.1, Sonnet 4, Sonnet 3.7
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.thinki.description: Thinking mode for Claude models. Adaptive lets the model decide when to reason; Enabled always thinks with a budget; Disabled turns off thinking entirely.
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.thinki.title: Thinking Mode

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.thinki.description: Token budget for thinking when mode is 'enabled'. Ignored in adaptive mode. (minimum: 1024)
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.thinki.title: Thinking Budget Tokens

enumDescriptions: Maximum quality — Claude uses as many tokens as needed (recommended)
High quality with moderate token usage
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.thinki.description: Thinking effort level for Claude Opus 4.5+ and Sonnet 4.5+. Controls how eagerly Claude spends tokens when reasoning.
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.thinki.title: Thinking Effort

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.defaul.markdownDescription: Substring of the model ID to use as default (e.g. `claude-opus-4-6`). This model will be listed first so VS Code selects it automatically.
languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.defaul.title: Default Model

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.modelO.markdownDescription: Per-model configuration overrides. Keys are model ID substrings (e.g. `claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-sonnet-4-5`). Each value can override `thinkingType`, `maxInputTokens`, or `maxOutputTokens` for that model.

thinkingType.description: Override thinking mode for this model. Overrides the global thinkingType setting.

maxInputTokens.description: Override the maximum context window (input tokens) for this model.

maxOutputTokens.description: Override the maximum output tokens for this model.

languageModelChatProvider.bedrock.modelO.title: Per-Model Overrides
